name: markdown-to-pdf
title: Markdown to PDF
description: Convert markdown into beautifully styled PDFs using Ask AI.
author: shaynelarocque

commands.name: convert-markdown
commands.title: Convert Markdown
commands.description: Convert markdown into a styled PDF via Ask AI

tools.name: convert-markdown-to-doc
tools.title: Convert Markdown to PDF
tools.description: Convert markdown content into a styled PDF file.

preferences.name: customThemeName
preferences.title: Custom Theme Name
preferences.description: A name for your custom theme (e.g. 'corporate'). Use this name when asking the AI to apply your theme.

preferences.name: customAccentColor
preferences.title: Custom Accent Color
preferences.description: Hex color for headings, links, and table headers (e.g. #2563eb).

preferences.name: customSurfaceColor
preferences.title: Custom Surface Color
preferences.description: Hex color for code block and table stripe backgrounds (e.g. #f8fafc).

ai.description:
- Use this tool when the user provides markdown content and asks for a PDF.
- Optional layout controls: `font` (`helvetica|times|courier`), `fontSize` (8-18), `lineSpacing` (1.0-2.4), and per-side margins `marginTop|marginRight|marginBottom|marginLeft` (24-120).
- Optional `theme`: built-in themes are `default`, `minimal`, `executive`, `ocean`, `warm`. The user may also have a custom theme configured in extension preferences — use the name they specify.
- If no output directory is provided, use `~/Downloads`.
- Return the final absolute path to the generated file.
